iran_nuke.notes: Day 15 00:04 — FALLING. No change. Mojtaba Khamenei's first statement remains entirely conventional-focused. Kharg Island struck by US but oil infrastructure deliberately spared — Trump signaling limits. No nuclear escalation signals. Latent capability (460kg 60% uranium) remains but operational pathway degraded by scientists killed + Isfahan buried. Nuclear track continues de-escalation.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 15 00:04 — RISING/IMMINENT. CRITICAL NEW EVENT: (1) US STRIKES KHARG ISLAND — Trump says 'obliterated every military target' on Iran's crown jewel oil island. Oil infrastructure deliberately SPARED but Trump threatens: 'should Iran or anyone interfere with free passage through Hormuz, I will...' Kharg handles ~90% of Iran's oil exports. (2) Iran launched fresh ballistic missiles at Israel just after midnight March 14 — no casualties reported. (3) UAE intercepts 10 ballistic missiles + 26 drones on Thursday alone. Shahed drone hit near Fairmont Palm Hotel on Palm Jumeirah. (4) 1,000+ cargo ships blocked from Hormuz transit (Guardian). (5) UAE charges 20 people including British tourist for filming/posting attack footage — cybercrime laws. (6) CNBC: Dubai described as 'functioning but tense.' (7) Khamenei vows Hormuz blockade 'must continue' and hints at 'additional fronts where enemy is extremely vulnerable.' Global escalation deepening. 78→82.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 15 00:04 — IMMINENT STABLE. No major new developments in this cycle. Zrarieh Bridge destruction + Gaza-scale threats + leaflets over Beirut remain the latest escalations. 773 dead in Lebanon. ISW: Israel 'seizing moment to finish Hezbollah.' Await next cycle for ground incursion update. 82 stable.

turkey.notes: CRITICAL — RISING STABLE. Third missile intercept confirmed by NYT/Reuters/Bloomberg/France24. Western officials now confirm March 4 missile specifically targeted Incirlik base. Turkey demanding Tehran clarify. Article 4 pressure mounting. No 4th intercept yet. 36 stable.

india.notes: Stable deterrent. No new signals. India monitoring Hormuz shipping impacts. No escalation indicators.

russia.notes: Day 15 00:04 — Stable. Guardian: UK Defence Secretary Healey publicly linking Iran-Russia — 'laying ground for hard choices.' Russia providing piloting tips to Iran (denied by Putin to Trump). Russia wants Trump's help on Ukraine. Minor uptick 7→8 as Healey linkage rhetoric continues. Still deterrent zone.

china.notes: Stable deterrent. 13 days of near-zero PLA flights broken Mar 13 with 5 aircraft. US military commanders worried about 'shrinking stockpiles' affecting Asia posture as Marines redeploy from Okinawa to ME. $14B Taiwan arms deal awaiting Trump approval. Trump-Xi summit prep (Mar 31-Apr 2). Key watch: Pacific force gaps as assets shift to ME.

north_korea.notes: Stable elevated. OFAC sanctioned DPRK IT networks. No military provocations. Iran-DPRK cooperation revival 'highly likely.' China-DPRK engagement increasing.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 15 00:04 — RISING. Zelensky: US sought postponement of trilateral Ukraine talks. ISW: Russian offensive continues, Ukraine exploiting dispersed Russian positions. Russia ~1.28M total casualties, 860 KIA/WIA in 24h. Trump deal stalling as US consumed by Iran war. US military commanders flag 'shrinking stockpiles' due to Iran operations. 27→28.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: No new reports in this cycle. Saudi-Pakistan Strategic Mutual Defence Agreement active. China mediating. Stable elevated.

top_signals: US STRIKES KHARG ISLAND — Trump: 'obliterated every military target' on Iran's crown jewel oil island. Oil infrastructure SPARED but Trump threatens destruction if Hormuz not reopened. Kharg handles ~90% of Iran oil exports. (BBC/NYT/Axios/Politico)
Iran launches fresh ballistic missiles at Israel just after midnight March 14 — no casualties reported (The Hindu/Israeli rescue services)
UAE intercepts 10 ballistic missiles + 26 drones on Thursday alone. Shahed drone hit near Fairmont Palm Hotel on Palm Jumeirah. Dubai Creek Harbour hotel struck. (The National/Wikipedia)
1,000+ cargo ships blocked from Hormuz transit — effectively 1/5th of world's oil supply disrupted (Guardian)
Khamenei: Hormuz blockade 'must continue,' hints at 'additional fronts where enemy is extremely vulnerable' (ISW/understandingwar.org)
Third Iranian ballistic missile intercepted over Turkey near Incirlik nuclear base in 10 days — Western officials confirm March 4 targeted Incirlik specifically (NYT/Reuters/Bloomberg)
UAE charges 20 people including British tourist for filming/posting attack footage under cybercrime laws (Guardian)
CNN: Trump admin had NO contingency plan for Hormuz closure — 'bedrock principle of US security policy for decades' ignored

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: CONVENTIONAL ESCALATION DEEPENS: Kharg Island struck — Trump's biggest strike yet on Iranian soil, explicitly targeting Iran's economic lifeline while keeping oil infrastructure as leverage. Trump threatening to destroy oil if Hormuz not reopened. Iran responding with fresh missiles at Israel + Khamenei vowing Hormuz blockade 'must continue' + hinting at 'additional fronts.' 1,000+ ships blocked from Hormuz. UAE now regularly intercepting missiles/drones. Dubai strikes hitting luxury districts (Palm Jumeirah, Creek Harbour, DIFC). Gulf-wide war fully operational. NUCLEAR TRACK: Still de-escalating — no signals. KEY WATCH FOR NEXT 6H: Whether Trump follows through on Kharg oil infrastructure threat; Iran's 'additional fronts' hint — could mean cyber, proxy activation, or new geographic targets; whether 4th missile intercept over Turkey triggers Article 4; whether Israel ground incursion in Lebanon follows bridge destruction; shipping insurance collapse accelerating energy crisis.

latest_news.headline: US obliterates military targets on Kharg Island — Trump threatens oil infrastructure if Hormuz not reopened
latest_news.text: Trump: 'Obliterated every military target on Iran's crown jewel, Kharg Island.' Oil infrastructure deliberately spared. Threat: 'Should Iran or anyone interfere with free passage through Strait of Hormuz, I will [destroy oil].' Kharg handles ~90% of Iran's oil exports. Biggest single strike on Iranian territory.

latest_news.headline: Iran launches fresh ballistic missiles at Israel just after midnight March 14
latest_news.text: Iran fired fresh round of missiles toward Israel just after midnight Saturday (Tehran time). Israeli rescue workers report no casualties. Iran state media confirmed launch.

latest_news.headline: UAE intercepts 10 ballistic missiles and 26 drones in single day; Shahed drone hits near Fairmont Palm Hotel on Palm Jumeirah
latest_news.text: UAE air defenses intercepted 10 ballistic missiles and 26 drones on Thursday. Shahed drone struck near Fairmont The Palm Hotel on Palm Jumeirah causing fire and blast damage. Dubai Creek Harbour hotel residence also struck. DIFC area hit. Life in Dubai described as 'functioning but tense' (CNBC).

latest_news.headline: Khamenei: Hormuz blockade 'must continue,' hints at 'additional fronts where enemy is extremely vulnerable'
latest_news.text: New Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei reaffirmed Iran will continue blocking Strait of Hormuz and may open 'additional fronts where the enemy is extremely vulnerable.' Did not specify what fronts.

latest_news.headline: 1,000+ cargo ships blocked from Hormuz transit — 1/5th of world's oil supply disrupted
latest_news.text: More than 1,000 cargo ships, mainly oil and gas tankers, blocked from transiting Strait of Hormuz. Tehran effectively controls the world's most important oil transit point.

latest_news.headline: Western officials confirm March 4 Iranian missile specifically targeted Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Western officials now confirm first missile (March 4) targeted Incirlik base which houses US B61 nuclear weapons. Second missile (March 9) entered Turkish airspace. Third (March 13) neutralized by NATO. Turkey demands Tehran clarify.

latest_news.headline: UAE charges 20 people including British tourist for filming/posting Iranian attack footage under cybercrime laws
latest_news.text: 20 people charged in UAE under cybercrime laws for filming and posting material related to Iranian attacks. British man among them. UAE using strict cybercrime legislation to control war narrative.

latest_news.headline: US military commanders worried about 'shrinking stockpiles' affecting Asia posture as Marines redeploy from Okinawa
latest_news.text: US military commanders flag concern that sustained Iran operations are depleting weapons stockpiles and pulling forces from Pacific. 2,200 Marines redeployed from Okinawa to ME. Potential force posture gaps affecting Taiwan/China deterrent.

outlook: IMMINENT — Global war probability RISING to 45%. Three critical developments in this cycle: (1) KHARG ISLAND STRUCK: Trump's most significant single strike — obliterating military targets on Iran's oil export crown jewel (~90% of exports). Oil infrastructure deliberately spared as leverage. Trump explicitly threatening to destroy it if Hormuz not reopened. This is Trump's biggest escalation card yet. (2) IRAN FIRES FRESH MISSILES AT ISRAEL: Just after midnight March 14, no casualties. Shows Iran's retaliatory capacity intact despite massive strikes. (3) KHAMENEI'S 'ADDITIONAL FRONTS' THREAT: New Supreme Leader vows Hormuz blockade 'must continue' and hints at opening new fronts 'where the enemy is extremely vulnerable.' Unspecified — could mean cyber attacks, proxy activation (Houthis, Iraqi PMF), or new geographic targets. This is the key unknown risk. UAE war now fully operational — 10 missiles + 26 drones intercepted in single day, Shahed hit Palm Jumeirah luxury district. 1,000+ ships blocked from Hormuz. 1/5th of world's oil supply disrupted. NEXT 6H WATCH: Trump's oil infrastructure follow-through; Iran's 'additional fronts' — what and where; 4th Turkey intercept → Article 4 trigger; Israel Lebanon ground incursion timing; Congressional response to Kharg strike.
